full_text: ## PMI - Ghana Chapter's Post. ### **PMI - Ghana Chapter**. Applied AI in Project Management: Leading Projects in the Age of Intelligent Systems. Join us for an insightful session with Dr. David King Boison, one of Africa's leading voices in digital transformation, artificial intelligence, innovation, and technology leadership. This promises to be a thought-provoking discussion on the future of project leadership in an AI-driven world. Don't miss this opportunity to learn, connect and prepare for the future of project management.
